description: Remove the 'Perbandingan Hak per Grade' comparison table from non-admin view in the Prosedur tab of Perjalanan Dinas. Each employee should only see their own grade's benefits and rules, not a side-by-side comparison of all tiers (BOD, HEAD, SENIOR, STAFF). The admin view (hasAccess(3)) should retain the full comparison table for configuration management purposes.
steps: In modules.js, locate the loadSPPDProsedur function (around line 4465).
Find the section starting with comment '// Comparison table of all grades' (around line 4552) that builds the 'Perbandingan Hak per Grade' table using allGrades array.

Wrap the entire comparison table block (from 'const allGrades = ...' through the closing of the table div, ending around line 4566 with '') inside an `if(hasAccess(3))` check, so only admin/manager/head/bod can see the comparison of all grade tiers.
For non-admin users (staff/leader), they already see their own grade info in the 'Ketentuan Berdasarkan Grade Anda' section above it - no additional content is needed.
The admin 'Konfigurasi Benefit per Grade' section (already wrapped in if(hasAccess(3))) remains unchanged.
Verify that renderPortalPeraturan() (line ~3475) already only shows the user's own grade - no changes needed there.
Run node --check modules.js to confirm no syntax errors.
acceptance_criteria: loadSPPDProsedur no longer shows the 'Perbandingan Hak per Grade' comparison table to staff/leader users
Admin/manager users (hasAccess(3) returns true) still see the comparison table
The user's own grade info section ('Ketentuan Berdasarkan Grade Anda') remains visible to all users
The admin 'Konfigurasi Benefit per Grade' section remains unchanged (admin-only)
node --check modules.js passes without syntax errors
verification: Run: grep -n 'Perbandingan Hak per Grade' /projects/sandbox/hr-legal-app/modules.js to confirm it still exists but is inside an access check
Run: grep -B2 'Perbandingan Hak per Grade' /projects/sandbox/hr-legal-app/modules.js to confirm hasAccess(3) guard is present before the comparison table
findings: The admin 'Konfigurasi Benefit per Grade' section originally referenced the outer allGrades const. Added its own const allGrades declaration inside its if(hasAccess(3)) block to maintain independence from the now-wrapped comparison table block. All syntax checks pass.
